top_hypotheses.hypothesis: Anthropic streaming API returns 502 for Fixture B on 2026-07-23
evidence_for: Both failed B runs have identical 502 Bad Gateway console error
Both A runs on same 2026-07-23 session have empty console_errors
Only Fixture B triggers 502 on same dev server session

top_hypotheses.hypothesis: App enters stage='error' — harness cannot detect, waits full 240s
evidence_for: action_bar_buttons_present shows Copy report=false, Start over=true — matches stage='error' panel
top_hypotheses.next_action: harness fail-fast selector race between Copy report and stage='error' marker

top_hypotheses.hypothesis: Fixture B prompt/output length trips upstream gateway limit
evidence_for: Fixture A works fine same day
evidence_against: Baseline B was 10 445 chars in 67 s — length alone cannot explain 502

top_hypotheses.hypothesis: Anthropic API side degradation for specific model/account/route
evidence_for: Four days between baseline success and failures
evidence_against: Fixture A on 2026-07-23 works fine with same API + model + account

top_hypotheses.hypothesis: Local Next.js dev-server compilation error triggered by Fixture B target only
240s hard threshold too tight for legitimate slow generation
evidence_against: Baseline B was 67s, so 240s is 3.5x safety margin
QI wrapper runs strictly downstream of wait-for-done + scratchpad-save block
A runs work fine — selector is not the issue

recommended_next_loop.name: AgentOps-5d-b-timeout-diagnostics
